wordmark.purpose: Raccourier in the header; the only 700 weight, leading R in teal.

title.purpose: A message title; the glanceable one-line anchor of each card. Truncates with ellipsis.

body.purpose: Rendered markdown message prose in soft ink; the only long-form text.

meta.purpose: Timestamps (tabular-nums) and the source badge; quiet, out of the way.

mono.purpose: Inline and block code inside a message; the voice of whatever the agent pasted.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Faint dimensionality on an unread message card; removed when read.

shadows.name: alert-flare
shadows.purpose: Rust ring + soft glow lifting an alert message off the calm stack.

shadows.name: top-glow
shadows.purpose: Fixed 160px teal wash from the top edge, echoing the toast the message arrived as.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions and the message entrance.

motion.name: msg-in
motion.purpose: New-message entrance: slides down and settles as it prepends to the top.

components.name: Message Card (unread, info)
components.description: The signature: a severity-tinted card, dot + title + time, source badge, markdown body. Clicking marks it read.
components.html:
Morning mail triage: 12 threads1h ago
gmail-jira-triage
Two threads need a reply.
components.css: .ds-msg{--sev:oklch(0.78 0.085 168);background:color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.255 0.014 165) 91%, var(--sev) 9%);border:1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.08);border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.25);color:oklch(0.95 0.008 95);font-family:"Segoe UI Variable Text",system-ui,sans-serif;cursor:pointer;transition:background .3s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1),border-color .2s}.ds-msg:hover{border-color:oklch(1 0 0 / 0.14);background:color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.255 0.014 165) 85%, var(--sev) 15%)}.ds-msg-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px}.ds-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--sev);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--sev) 22%, transparent)}.ds-title{font-weight:600;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:-0.005em;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}.ds-spacer{flex:1}.ds-time{font-size:11px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;color:oklch(0.70 0.014 140)}.ds-source{display:inline-block;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.02em;color:color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.77 0.045 78) 82%, white);background:oklch(0.77 0.045 78 / 0.12);border:1px solid oklch(0.77 0.045 78 / 0.20);padding:1px 8px;border-radius:999px;margin-bottom:8px}.ds-body{font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;color:oklch(0.82 0.012 120)}

components.name: Message Card (alert)
components.description: The one card allowed to break the calm: rust dot, rust-mixed border, and the alert flare glow.
components.html:
Deploy failed - UAT is down2m ago
Render build exited 1.
components.css: .ds-msg-alert{--sev:oklch(0.68 0.15 38);background:color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.255 0.014 165) 91%, var(--sev) 9%);border:1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(1 0 0 / 0.14) 40%, var(--sev) 40%);border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px oklch(0.68 0.15 38 / 0.15),0 2px 10px oklch(0.68 0.15 38 / 0.14);color:oklch(0.95 0.008 95);font-family:"Segoe UI Variable Text",system-ui,sans-serif}.ds-msg-alert .ds-msg-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px}.ds-dot-a{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--sev);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--sev) 22%, transparent)}.ds-msg-alert .ds-title{font-weight:600;font-size:14px}.ds-msg-alert .ds-spacer{flex:1}.ds-msg-alert .ds-time{font-size:11px;color:oklch(0.70 0.014 140)}.ds-msg-alert .ds-body{font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;color:oklch(0.82 0.012 120)}

components.name: Message Card (read)
components.description: Handled: flat surface, no tint or shadow, dimmed, hollow-ring dot. Visibly done, never gone.
components.html:
PR #218 merged and deployed3h ago
fix/host-loopback-bind is live on UAT.
components.css: .ds-msg-read{background:oklch(0.255 0.014 165);border:1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.08);border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;opacity:0.7;font-family:"Segoe UI Variable Text",system-ui,sans-serif}.ds-msg-read .ds-msg-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px}.ds-dot-r{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:transparent;border:1.5px solid oklch(0.70 0.014 140)}.ds-title-r{font-weight:500;font-size:14px;color:oklch(0.82 0.012 120)}.ds-msg-read .ds-spacer{flex:1}.ds-msg-read .ds-time{font-size:11px;color:oklch(0.70 0.014 140)}.ds-body-r{font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;color:oklch(0.82 0.012 120)}

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Header actions (Mark all read, Clear); transparent pill, warms on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost{font-family:"Segoe UI Variable Text",system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:oklch(0.82 0.012 120);background:transparent;border:1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.14);border-radius:999px;padding:5px 13px;cursor:pointer;transition:color .15s,background .15s,border-color .15s}.ds-btn-ghost:hover{color:oklch(0.95 0.008 95);background:oklch(0.305 0.016 165);border-color:transparent}.ds-btn-ghost:active{transform:translateY(0.5px)}.ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible{outline:2px solid oklch(0.78 0.085 168);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Source Badge
components.description: Low-chroma tan pill marking a message source/origin; context, not headline.
components.css: .ds-source-badge{display:inline-block;font-family:"Segoe UI Variable Text",system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.02em;color:color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.77 0.045 78) 82%, white);background:oklch(0.77 0.045 78 / 0.12);border:1px solid oklch(0.77 0.045 78 / 0.20);padding:1px 8px;border-radius:999px}

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Sanctioned warmth moment: centered teal parcel glyph in a soft tile over friendly copy.
components.html:
No deliveries yet

Raccourier will drop your alerts right here.
components.css: .ds-empty{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;padding:32px;text-align:center;color:oklch(0.70 0.014 140);font-family:"Segoe UI Variable Text",system-ui,sans-serif}.ds-empty-glyph{width:64px;height:64px;display:grid;place-items:center;border-radius:18px;background:color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.255 0.014 165) 80%, oklch(0.78 0.085 168) 20%);border:1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.08);box-shadow:0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.3)}.ds-empty-h{margin:0;font-size:15px;color:oklch(0.95 0.008 95);font-weight:650}.ds-empty-p{margin:0;font-size:12.5px;max-width:30ch;line-height:1.5}

components.name: Inline Code
components.description: Amber-on-ink-well inline code inside a message body; the one warm highlight in machine text.

narrative.overview: Raccourier is the corner of the desk a local Claude agent drops your alerts on. A single always-on window over a warm dark-charcoal canvas: a quiet stack of message cards, newest on top, each legible in a one-second glance. The room is dim so a delivery reads bright, a faint teal glow bleeds from the top edge, and every message wears exactly as much color as its urgency earns. Color is severity here, never decoration. This is the source of the shared brand family SeniorDev sampled its palette from; where the workbench keeps the raccoon offstage, Raccourier is the mascot’s home turf. It reads as warm, quietly capable, and honest — a friendly courier, not a notification-center nag.
keyCharacteristics: Dark warm-charcoal canvas, warm off-white ink, one soft teal glow.
OKLCH throughout — the palette is authored and reasoned in OKLCH, not hex.
Severity IS color: info/teal, success/green, warning/amber, alert/rust — earned per message, never decorative.
Flat tonal layering (bg/surface/surface-2) plus hairlines; shadow reserved for arrival and lift.
One consumer sans (Segoe UI Variable) for everything the human reads; mono only inside message code.
Calm at rest; intensity reserved for what matters.

rules.name: The Severity-Is-Color Rule
rules.body: Teal, green, amber, and rust appear only as message severity (and their fixed interactive roles). Never brand flavor or decoration; severity is never conveyed by color alone.

rules.name: The Earned-Intensity Rule
rules.body: Chroma tracks urgency. Info sits at a whisper (~9% surface tint); an alert is the one message permitted a colored border and a glow.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Type sizes are fixed px/em, never clamp(). A notifier window is viewed at a consistent size and DPI.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Segoe UI Variable for everything the human reads; Cascadia/Consolas only for code the agent emitted.

rules.name: The Tone-First Rule
rules.body: Reach for a lighter plane or the severity tint before a shadow. Shadow is for arrival and lift, not for separating stacked cards.

dos: Do author every color in OKLCH; the frontmatter values are the source of truth.
Do map color to severity and nothing else; reserve rust and the Alert Flare for genuine alerts.
Do convey depth with the tonal planes and hairlines first; reach for a shadow only for card lift, the alert flare, or arrival.
Do keep the window legible at a glance - dot, title, source, time land first; body is for the lean-in.
Do give every interactive element a visible outline focus state - the audience is keyboard-first.
Do pair severity with the dot, title weight, copy, and (for alerts) border + shadow; never rely on color alone.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion with an instant alternative.
Do verify ink-muted body/caption text clears 4.5:1 on its plane, including over a severity-tinted card.
donts: Don’t build a SaaS notification center: no gray-row dropdowns, card grids, or hero-metric tiles.
Don’t manufacture urgency - no anxiety badges, bouncing icons, or red dots that guilt-trip.
Don’t over-mascot or turn warmth into a sticker pack; the raccoon leads in moments, not every message.
Don’t add flashy or decorative motion or glassmorphism; the one blur is the functional sticky header.
Don’t use background-clip:text gradient text, or a colored border-left/right > 1px as a stripe accent.
Don’t use clamp()/fluid type or a display font anywhere.
Don’t let a read message stay loud - read is visibly done (dim, flat, hollow dot).
